blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
